ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "api" TEXT /* API number for the well */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator for the well */,
  "spud_dt" TEXT /* Spud date for the well */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the well record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the well record was last updated */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the well is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES well_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES well_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., OH, TX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the well type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the well status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well location */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the well */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the well */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the well is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_locations_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_amount" REAL /* Amount of production */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., oil, gas, water) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the production amount (e.g., barrels, MCF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_production_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_comments_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
